title: 【連登炒車】【fake news?】美國民主黨竟然支持殺嬰？？

replies.msg:
原po:
川普怒了 墮胎倖存者保護法被民主黨否決
- 分享自 LIHKG 討論區
https://lih.kg/cprciT

https://www.factcheck.org/2019/03/the-facts-on-the-born-alive-debate/

其實成件事好多細微位

首先殺害已誕下並存活嘅嬰兒
一向就當係殺人
相關刑事法例由各州政府決定
https://definitions.uslegal.com/i/infanticide/
Infanticide refers to the act of killing of a newborn child. Infanticide is usually committed by the parents or with their consent. It is also known as child destruction or neonaticide. In criminal law, infanticide is not considered a separate and distinct offense, except where made so by statute, but is merely descriptive of a homicide, the subject of which is a newborn child


更何況根據2002年通過嘅《存活嬰兒保護法》( “Born-Alive Infants Protection Act of 2002'')
https://www.congress.gov/bill/107th-congress/house-bill/2175/text
將美國法例中對「人」嘅定義統一涵蓋「活生生誕下的嬰兒」
咁謀殺罪嘅定義當然包括殺嬰啦
In determining the meaning of any Act of Congress, or of any ruling, regulation, or interpretation of the various administrative bureaus and agencies of the United States, the words “person”, “human being”, ”child“, and “individual”, shall include every infant member of the species homo sapiens who is born alive at any stage of development.


當中「活生生誕下」（born alive）嘅定義
係指「任何階段抽取或排出，並在此之後有呼吸、心臟跳動、臍帶脈動或自願肌肉移動嘅的嬰兒」，當中包括墮胎排出的嬰兒
the complete expulsion or extraction from his or her mother of that member, at any stage of development, who after such expulsion or extraction breathes or has a beating heart, pulsation of the umbilical cord, or definite movement of voluntary muscles, regardless of whether the umbilical cord has been cut, and regardless of whether the expulsion or extraction occurs as a result of natural or induced labor, cesarean section, or induced abortion.



所以有無今次法案都好，殺害出咗世嘅嬰兒一直都係當殺人處理
§ 1532 b(2)基本上係多餘
原po鬧左膠禍國殃民班on9仔可以收皮

而且墮胎後倖存嘅案例極少
現時僅有規定紀錄墮胎存活事故嘅7個州份
Arizona : 2017年8月立法要求紀錄墮胎存活事故，於2017年8月至12月期間有10宗報告，全年墮胎有12533宗
Florida：2018年有70083宗墮胎，6宗活生生誕下
Michigan：
Minnesota： 2017年有10177宗墮胎，3宗為活生生誕下，均未能存活
Oklahoma ：2012-14及2016年並無相關報告，2015及2017年資料中無相關數據
Texas：搵到資料嘅2013-2015呢3年間，並無墮胎存活事故

正如代表美國婦產科學院（ACOG）嘅醫生所講
晚期墮胎用嘅「擴張並抽取」(dilation & evacuation)係無存活可能
何況往往會配合停頓胎兒心臟嘅藥物使用

咁今次條法律爭拗點響邊
就在於究竟條法例講嘅墮胎係啲乜
草案對「墮胎」嘅定義係

“(1) ABORTION.—The term ‘abortion’ means the use or prescription of any instrument, medicine, drug, or any other substance or device—
“(A) to intentionally kill the unborn child of a woman known to be pregnant; or
“(B) to intentionally terminate the pregnancy of a woman known to be pregnant, with an intention other than—
“(i) after viability, to produce a live birth and preserve the life and health of the child born alive; or
“(ii) to remove a dead unborn child.


即係 依家個胎有異常
要催產，預咗個嬰兒有機會夭折
醫護人員同家屬選擇
如果嬰兒無咩機會生存落去(not in survivable condition)
咁就唔會用盡一切手段去救佢
而係用類似舒緩治療嘅方法

咁呢種「紓緩治療」
請問是否屬於草案中所講

“(A) exercise the same degree of professional skill, care, and diligence to preserve the life and health of the child as a reasonably diligent and conscientious health care practitioner would render to any other child born alive at the same gestational age; and

“(B) following the exercise of skill, care, and diligence required under subparagraph (A), ensure that the child born alive is immediately transported and admitted to a hospital.


條草案嘅問題正正在於呢點不確定性
呢個po唔會有人理

replies.msg: Fans既先打個靚飛機先

其實啲英文係引文黎嘅
重點全部都翻譯咗做中文

墮胎係我哋女姓嘅人權

妖皮啦父權撚
